description: The team decides the best hope for Yo-Yo regaining her powers is to seek help from Jiaying at Afterlife. May and Elena prepare for the mission, discussing the need for a cover story and how to approach Jiaying. They express their anxieties about the plan and acknowledge the possible dangers.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Sit down. I can feel you worrying from here.
You can? I thought you needed to touch someone to do that. When did this start?
While we were in the Lighthouse. I was starting to feel more like myself, and then, um... I picked up on you and Mack's, um... reunion from outside the room.
And invasive. You feeling what I'm feeling is just gonna stress the both of us out even more.
A negative emotion feedback loop. I'm well aware.
Could be useful with Daisy's mom, though. Wasn't she a murderer?
Only after Hydra cut her to pieces and left her for dead.
Still, can't hurt to stay on her good side.
Yeah. We should land cloaked and approach on foot. The last time Jiaying saw a Quinjet, she started a war.
We never came up with a cover story.
Well, just try to keep it simple, tell part of the truth.
An alien bird flew into my mouth in the future.
